Package daos.common.worker

Class WorkerDao

  • java.lang.Object
    • daos.common.AbstractDao
      • daos.common.worker.WorkerDao

    MTWorkerDao
    @Singleton
public class WorkerDao
extends AbstractDao
    DAO for abstract Worker entity
